jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Backend Software Engineer to design, build, and maintain scalable APIs and microservices that power our enterprise SaaS platform. You will work closely with product and frontend teams to deliver reliable, high-performance systems.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
2+ years of experience with Python or Go
Strong understanding of RESTful API design
Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL or MySQL)
Familiarity with Docker and containerized deployments
Understanding of CI/CD pipelines

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Join our product team as a Frontend Engineer and help build the next generation of our web application. You will translate designs into polished, accessible user interfaces and work in close collaboration with UX designers and backend engineers.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field
2+ years of experience with React or Vue.js
Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, or Pinia)
Familiarity with REST APIs and async data fetching
Understanding of web accessibility standards (WCAG)
nice_to_have: Familiarity with Figma or design handoff workflows

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: We are growing our AI team and looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to help design, train, and deploy ML models that power intelligent features across our platform. You will own the full ML lifecycle from data preprocessing to production monitoring.
requirements: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field
Experience building and deploying machine learning models in Python
Proficiency with PyTorch or TensorFlow
Solid understanding of supervised and unsupervised learning techniques
Experience with data pipelines and feature engineering
Familiarity with MLflow or similar experiment tracking tools
nice_to_have: Experience with LLMs or NLP pipelines
Familiarity with Spark or large-scale data processing

jobs.title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a DevOps / Platform Engineer to help us build and maintain the infrastructure that keeps our platform running reliably at scale. You will own our CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and observability stack.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience
2+ years of experience in a DevOps or SRE role
Strong experience with AWS or GCP
Proficiency with Terraform or Pulumi for infrastructure as code
Experience with Kubernetes and Helm
Familiarity with monitoring and alerting tools (Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana)
nice_to_have: Background in security and compliance (SOC 2, ISO 27001)

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: As a Full Stack Engineer at Nexus Systems you will take ownership of features end to end, from database schema design through to pixel-perfect UI. You will thrive in a fast-paced environment where you can make a big impact on a small, focused team.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field
Experience building production applications with a modern backend framework (Django, FastAPI, Node.js, or similar)
Proficiency with React or a comparable frontend framework
Experience with SQL databases and ORM usage
Comfort working across the full web stack
Strong communication and collaboration skills
